fields.name: invoice_number
fields.label: Invoice Number
fields.description: Commercial invoice or document reference number, usually in the header

fields.name: consignee
fields.label: Consignee
fields.description: Consignee or buyer name and address block on the invoice

fields.name: total_amount_usd
fields.label: Total Amount USD
fields.description: Invoice total in USD; use the grand total, not line subtotals

fields.name: line_items
fields.label: Line Items
fields.description: One row per product line in the invoice table; do not invent rows

item_fields.name: item_code
item_fields.label: Item Code
item_fields.description: Product or SKU code column for each line

item_fields.name: description
item_fields.label: Description
item_fields.description: Product description text for the line item

item_fields.name: quantity
item_fields.label: Quantity
item_fields.description: Quantity shipped or ordered for this line

item_fields.name: unit_price_usd
item_fields.label: Unit Price USD
item_fields.description: Unit price in USD for one item on this line

item_fields.name: total_amount_usd
item_fields.label: Line Total USD
item_fields.description: Line total amount in USD for this row

item_fields.name: hs_code
item_fields.label: HS Code
item_fields.description: Harmonized System tariff code for the product line
